assertions.description: INCORRECT: The Fourier left keyboard has 4 actual row nets (rowA, rowB, rowC, rowD) and 6 column nets (col1–col6), for 34 actual key switches (excluding SW_RST1). The topology-based detector reports 5 rows and 13 columns, placing 'col2' in row_nets and 'rowB', 'rowC' in col_nets — mixing up rows and columns. The reported switches_on_matrix=54 and diodes_on_matrix=54 are ~59% higher than the actual 34 key switches.
